prompt: Add color coding to each part to indicate different materials used in the construction.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a color coding system to the technical illustration of the product's components. Assign a unique color to each distinct material used in the construction of the individual parts (1-10). Ensure that parts made of the same material share the same color, and parts made of different materials are represented by clearly contrasting colors, providing a distinct visual identification of the materials across the entire assembly.
